name: CSV to Report
description: Paste CSV data and get an AI-analyzed report with key stats, patterns, and insights

config.userPrompt:
Analyze the CSV data below and produce a clear, structured report.

## Output Format

### Dataset Overview
- Number of rows and columns
- Column names and data types (inferred)
- Any obvious data quality issues (blanks, inconsistencies, duplicates)

### Key Statistics
For numeric columns: min, max, average, notable outliers.
For text/category columns: unique value counts, most common values.

### Patterns & Insights
3-5 bullet points highlighting the most interesting findings.

### Recommended Actions
1-3 concrete next steps based on what the data shows.

Be specific — reference actual values from the data.

CSV DATA:
{{INPUT}}
